programming_language.practice_prompt: Write a small program using {skill} that solves a real problem from your target role.
programming_language.self_check: Can you explain {skill} to a junior developer without notes?

framework.practice_prompt: Build a minimal working example using {skill} that demonstrates its core feature.
framework.self_check: Can you list the top 5 reasons to use {skill} over its alternatives?

soft_skill.practice_prompt: Write a short story from your past experience demonstrating {skill}. Use STAR format.
soft_skill.self_check: Can you give a concrete example of {skill} you demonstrated in the past month?
